name: Max Metalmorph
name_jp: メタル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>反</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>射</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Tribute 1 face-up monster; Special Summon 1 monster that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set and mentions "Max Metalmorph" from your hand, Deck, or GY, then you can equip this card to it with the following effect.
● The equipped monster gains 400 ATK/DEF, it cannot be destroyed by Spell or monster effects, also your opponent cannot target it with monster effects or Spell Cards or effects.
You can only activate 1 "Max Metalmorph" per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
